use_cases: Displaying validation error messages for form inputs like select dropdowns
Showing inline error feedback with optional action links for user guidance
Providing accessible error states with descriptive icons in forms
ai_summary: A form validation error component with customizable size variants and optional action link support. Uses inline SVG icons for error indication and displays red-themed error messaging. Part of a select input component system, designed to show validation feedback below or alongside form controls. Built with Tailwind CSS for consistent styling across different size configurations.
